user.title: Location
user.description: Enter the building location for weather and solar calculations.

rooms.title: Define Rooms
rooms.description: Add rooms to be controlled by PumpAhead. Add at least one room.

entities.title: Entity Mapping: {room_name}
entities.description: Select Home Assistant entities for this room. PumpAhead validates units (°C, %, W).

hp_mapping.title: HP Mode Mapping
hp_mapping.description: Map your heat pump's operating states to PumpAhead states. Enter the exact state string as shown by your HP integration (e.g., 'Heat', 'DHW', 'Defrost') and select the corresponding PumpAhead mode.

algorithm.title: Algorithm Parameters
algorithm.description: Configure the control algorithm mode and tuning weights.

confirm.title: Confirm Setup
confirm.description: PumpAhead will be set up with {num_rooms} room(s) in {algorithm_mode} mode at location ({latitude}, {longitude}). Confirm to complete setup.

error.duplicate_room_name: A room with this name already exists
error.invalid_area: Floor area must be greater than 0
error.no_rooms: At least one room is required
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant
error.invalid_unit: Entity has incorrect unit of measurement
error.entity_unavailable: Entity is currently unavailable — it may come online later
error.empty_hp_state: HP state string cannot be empty
error.duplicate_hp_state: This HP state is already mapped

abort.already_configured: PumpAhead is already configured for this location

init.title: PumpAhead Live Control
init.description: Enable live control per room. When enabled, PumpAhead will actively control valves and splits for the selected rooms. Disabled rooms remain in shadow (read-only) mode.

hp_mapping.title: Edit HP Mode Mapping
hp_mapping.description: Edit the mapping between your heat pump's operating states and PumpAhead states. Modify existing entries or add new ones. Leave the new entry blank to skip adding.
